code:
%%{Infra_LoadBalancer}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Infra_IngressController)

[Infra_LoadBalancer] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Infra_WorkerNode)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Infra_WorkerNode)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Infra_WorkerNode)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Infra_WorkerNode] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Infra_IngressController设计一个Hub同步状态机。核心场景是：当本地hub检测到与federation的状态分叉时，如何完成CRDT同步。起点应该是Infra_LoadBalancer感知到OUT_OF_SYNC状态。
确认一下，OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件具体包含哪些？我注意到有stale CRDT frame、missing contributions or metrics、network topology change这三类，是否需要都在note里体现？
对，这三类都要写。然后OUT_OF_SYNC通过BeginSync事件转移到FETCH_REMOTE，这里需要Infra_WorkerNode去federation peers拉取最新的CRDT vector clocks和state diffs。
已添加FETCH_REMOTE到MERGE的转移，事件是FrameDownloaded。MERGE阶段的note我写了apply CRDT merge function和ensure convergence on shared state。下一步是VALIDATE吗？
是的，MERGE完成后进入VALIDATE，需要验证schema + hash integrity，还要verify signatures from remote hubs。验证通过的话，由Infra_WorkerNode确认后进入SYNCED，最终回到Infra_LoadBalancer完成闭环。
异常路径我来补充：FETCH_REMOTE可能因NetworkTimeout或AuthError进入FAILED；MERGE可能因ConflictUnresolved失败；VALIDATE可能因HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid失败。FAILED之后应该有RETRY机制，最终回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新同步。
很好。还需要考虑运维场景：SYNCED状态可能因PeriodicSync或ParamChange回到OUT_OF_SYNC；另外如果HubOffline或LatencyHigh，应该进入DEGRADED状态，然后escalated to ops，由Infra_WorkerNode处理。
所有状态和转移已绘制完成。最后我为核心状态添加了统一的样式：OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED都应用了core样式，填充色#ff8b00。标题定为SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Infra_IngressController)。
确认无误。这个状态机完整覆盖了正常同步流、异常重试流以及运维降级流，可以归档了。
